text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Derby draws closer. One night, after another
hard session of diligent training...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: AIIIIIEEE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is that the cry of a demon-possessed pigeon? No,
it's Matikanefukukitaru! I rush to the classroom to
find...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! I-I-I-I saw it! I-it's right over there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Worse! Have a look, if you dare! Right there on
the wall, in the list of Derby entrants!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: A name I never thought I'd see... Look, it says... Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aiiieee! Her name is so bright my eyes can hardly
take it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: R-right... Sorry. I was just so surprised.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's pray together! As I am, I don't have
the confidence to race against the likes of
Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O gods, hear my supplication! Grant me a divine
shield against Suzuka's piercing light!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Such tremendous power may wreak terrible
curses. So, I beg of you—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What are you praying for, Fukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it obvious? I'm praying not to be consumed
by your all-powerful—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aiiieee! Suzuka?! What are you doing here?! Have
you come to vanquish me once and for all?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... I'm only here to pray, just like you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I want to do my best in the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You want to... do your best? But why would
someone like you need to pray for something like
that?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I think we all feel the same way in the run-up to
the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We don't want this monster of a race to get the
better of us... It's that intimidating.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You know, it's just like when your rival suddenly
starts to look unbeatable. But there's no reason
to panic.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's only natural to be scared.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Being scared is... natural?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well, if even someone like you can get scared...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It makes sense why I'd be terrified. For some
reason, I feel a little better hearing that.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thanks a lot, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm just happy to see that you're feeling better.
choice_data_list: Why don't you both pray for victory together?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Together? Yeah, good idea! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well Suzuka, since we're both here, we may as
well pray together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After they finish their prayers, Silence Suzuka
takes her leave.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew! All's well that ends well. That's quite a
weight off my sh—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Oh, no! Since we prayed together, doesn't
that mean Suzuka will get the same amount of
luck as me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If she has the same great blessing as me, then her
natural ability will surely seal her victory!
choice_data_list: Oh no! What should we do?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We've got no choice but to ask for divine
intervention!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O gods, hear me! Grant me the greatest, best,
most supremely sublime blessing that Umakind
has known or will ever know!
